meta.name: Heritage Menswear
meta.description: A refined, outdoor-inspired menswear store with an editorial layout. It features a muted, earthy color palette, combining high-quality lifestyle imagery with clean typography to appeal to a sophisticated, quality-conscious demographic.

header.notes: Top announcement bar is dark. Header is light, edge-to-edge. Logo on left, nav center, icons (search, user, cart) on right.

footer.description: Email signup text offering a generic discount for first purchase.
footer.notes: Multi-column layout. Left column has logo, email signup, and social icons. Middle columns have links. Right column has contact options (chat, text, email). Bottom area includes a promotional club box, copyright, and utility links.

productCard.notes: Clean minimal cards. Square or slightly vertical aspect ratio for images. Title, variant info, and price are left-aligned below the image. Typography is crisp and hierarchical.

productGrid.notes: Used as a carousel for 'Newest Arrivals'. Carousel controls are arrows outside the grid and a progress bar below.

featuredProducts.heading: Newest Arrivals
featuredProducts.notes: Carousel layout with a 'Shop New Arrivals ->' link right-aligned opposite the heading.

sections.name: announcement-bar
sections.notes: Appears at the very top of the page.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-bleed background image with text overlay

design.background: Full-bleed lifestyle photograph of a man on a beach
design.text: Dark text on light area of image

content.headline: Seasonal collection title
content.cta: Single solid dark rectangular button with white text

media.description: Man walking on beach in casual knitwear and shorts, carrying a bag. Warm, coastal, relaxed mood.

design.text: Dark foreground, uppercase small text below images
design.styling: No gaps between images, horizontal scroll indicated by partially visible 6th item and an arrow button.

content.headline: Shop by Category

media.description: Grid of square product detail/lifestyle shots corresponding to categories.

content.specialElements: Carousel next button overlaid on the right edge.

sections.name: brand-mission
sections.layout: Full-bleed background image with split text content

design.background: Full-bleed landscape photograph with dark gradient overlay
design.text: White text, large serif display font
design.styling: Text is split: large paragraph top left, shorter title bottom left.

content.headline: Brand values statement regarding environment and manufacturing

media.description: Wide, dark, moody landscape shot of rolling hills.

sections.notes: Creates a break in the product flow to tell brand story.

sections.name: product-grid-carousel
sections.layout: Grid carousel with heading and link

content.headline: Newest Arrivals

media.description: Cut-out product shots on white/light grey backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Progress bar indicator below the grid.

sections.name: split-promotions

design.background: Images act as background for each column
design.styling: No gap between columns. Text positioned bottom-left in each block.

content.headline: Category/Collection titles for each block
content.cta: Solid white rectangular button with dark text in each block

media.description: Left: Close up of a jacket on a hanger. Right: Man in dark suit outdoors.

sections.notes: Serves as large promotional banners for specific collections.

sections.name: featured-editorials
sections.layout: 2-column grid, 50/50 split with text below images

design.styling: Generous gap between columns, large portrait images.

content.headline: Editorial feature titles
content.body: Short descriptive sentence for each feature.

media.description: Left: Man in dark overshirt. Right: Flat lay of layered shirts.

sections.notes: Focuses on specific fabric or product types.

sections.name: blog-carousel
sections.layout: Grid of cards with horizontal scroll

design.styling: Cards have image top, text bottom. Small gaps.

media.description: Various editorial/lifestyle shots related to blog posts.

sections.name: testimonials
sections.layout: Centered container over full-bleed background image. 3-column grid inside container.

design.background: White container overlapping a dark, moody background image
design.text: Dark text in container, serif title
design.styling: Container has white background, padding. Cards have image, stars, quote, author, product link.

content.headline: Words From The Wild

media.description: Background: dark ocean/landscape. Cards: Lifestyle product shots on men.

content.specialElements: 5-star rating icons on each review card. Carousel arrows on container edges.

sections.notes: Effectively uses overlapping layout to stand out.
